CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, default_value UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('64', CAST('0', 'UInt64')), ('abc', CAST('0', 'UInt64')), ('-1', CAST('5', 'UInt64')), ('1.5', CAST('0', 'UInt64')), ('0xc0fe', CAST('0', 'UInt64')), ('NaN', CAST('10', 'UInt64')), ('Inf', CAST('20', 'UInt64'));
SELECT value, toUInt64OrDefault(value, default_value) FROM test_table;
SELECT toUInt64OrDefault((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value = '64'), CAST('0', 'UInt64'));
SELECT toUInt64OrDefault((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value = 'abc' LIMIT 1), CAST('0', 'UInt64'));
SELECT COUNT(*), toUInt64OrDefault(value, 0) FROM test_table GROUP BY value;
SELECT MAX(toUInt64OrDefault(value, 100)) AS max_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%a%') AS subquery;
WITH (SELECT AVG(toUInt64OrDefault(value, 0)) FROM test_table) AS avg_value SELECT avg_value;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO another_table SELECT number, value FROM (SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10) AS nums CROSS JOIN test_table;
